events.name: Hurricane Katrina
events.description: Formed as a depression over the Bahamas Aug 23, crossed Florida, then exploded to Category 5 (902 mb) over the Gulf before devastating New Orleans on Aug 29. Watch the pressure minimum deepen and the wind field spin up in the Gulf.

events.name: 2008 Afghanistan Blizzard
events.description: Afghanistan's coldest winter in decades — temperatures fell below −30 °C with up to 180 cm of mountain snow, killing over 900 people. Watch the temperature layer as successive cold surges pour off the Central Asian steppe.

events.name: Hurricane Sandy
events.description: "Superstorm" Sandy grew into the largest Atlantic hurricane on record (wind field ~1,850 km) before hooking west into New Jersey on Oct 29. Watch it merge with a mid-latitude trough — the hybrid transition that made it so destructive.

events.name: Hurricane Harvey
events.description: Harvey stalled over Texas for days, dropping 1,500+ mm of rain on Houston. Watch the moisture layer — a conveyor of Gulf water vapor feeding the stationary storm is exactly why it flooded so catastrophically.

events.name: Typhoon Haiyan (Yolanda)
events.description: One of the strongest tropical cyclones ever observed at landfall (~895 mb, 1-min winds ~315 km/h), devastating Tacloban in the Philippines on Nov 8. Watch how compact and violent the pressure core is compared to Sandy's sprawl.

events.name: 2003 European Heat Wave
events.description: A blocking high parked over western Europe for two weeks; France saw 40 °C+ and the death toll exceeded 70,000. Watch the temperature layer glow as the stagnant dome intensifies day after day.

events.name: 1993 Storm of the Century
events.description: A cyclone bombed out in the Gulf of Mexico and ran the entire US East Coast, setting low-pressure records from Florida to Maine with blizzards and a Gulf storm surge. Watch the explosive deepening on Mar 12–13.

events.name: 2021 Texas Cold Wave (Winter Storm Uri)
events.description: A collapsed polar vortex spilled Arctic air to the Gulf Coast; Texas hit −20 °C and the power grid failed for millions. Watch the cold pool slide south out of Canada and sit over Texas for a week.

events.name: Cyclone Nargis
events.description: Nargis turned east across the Bay of Bengal and drove a storm surge 40 km up the Irrawaddy Delta, killing over 138,000 in Myanmar. Watch the late eastward turn that forecasts of the era struggled to catch.

events.name: Hurricane Andrew
events.description: A tiny but ferocious Category 5 that flattened Homestead, Florida on Aug 24 (922 mb). Watch how small the circulation is — compact storms like Andrew are among the hardest to represent in coarse models.

events.name: 1998 North American Ice Storm
events.description: Five days of freezing rain coated Quebec, Ontario, and New England in up to 100 mm of ice, collapsing the power grid for weeks. Watch warm Gulf air overrunning a shallow cold layer — the classic ice-storm setup.

events.name: Cyclone Idai
events.description: Idai made a rare looping track in the Mozambique Channel, then flooded Beira and inland Mozambique, Zimbabwe, and Malawi — one of the Southern Hemisphere's deadliest cyclones. Watch the loop and the moisture surge inland.
